name: CanAlaska Uranium Ltd.
content: CanAlaska Uranium Ltd. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and exploration of high-grade uranium deposits in the Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan. The company holds interests in approximately 350,000 hectares (865,000 acres) of land, making it one of the largest landholders in the region. CanAlaska utilizes a project generator model, partnering with major mining companies like Cameco and Denison Mines to fund exploration while maintaining significant project equity. In addition to its primary uranium focus, the company also explores for nickel, copper, and diamonds in the Thompson Nickel Belt and other strategic locations.
